---
title: "Veranstaltungen"
---
## OA Datenpraxis Webinarreihe

#### [11.06.2026: OA Datenpraxis Webinar: Tools zum Monitoring von Publikationskosten in der Open-Access-Transformation](events/webinar_20260611.qmd)

#### [26.06.2026: University Rankings Under Scrutiny: Open Access as a Performance Indicator, and Institutional Perspectives from Germany and the Netherlands](events/webinar_20260626.qmd)

## Konferenzen & Tagungen
